opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I feel like my entire life has been a lie, and the exhaustion of realising how hard I've been pretending has physically broken me. I haven't slept in two days and I can't get out of bed.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The last 48 hours everything has caught up with me — I can't sleep at all, I can't function, and I don't know how to keep going like this.

symptom_narrative.onset: about two days ago it all came crashing down
symptom_narrative.character: waves of overwhelming grief and exhaustion, then anger, then more grief; my mind won't stop replaying my whole life
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: completely overwhelming — I have never felt this wrung out or broken
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: it's my whole body and my head — I'm physically exhausted and my chest feels tight and my heart races
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant, worse at night when I can't sleep
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing has helped; I've just been lying in the dark
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: trying to think about the past, and being on my own with it
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: I haven't been eating or drinking much, my heart feels like it's pounding, and I feel shaky and lightheaded when I stand up
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've felt burnt out before but never anything like this
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I've stopped everything — I'm not working, not answering anyone, I can barely get to the bathroom

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: recently diagnosed with autism and ADHD as an adult

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: recently received an adult autism/ADHD diagnosis and has been intensely re-examining their whole life through it; feels angry that it was missed for so long; has been withdrawing from old friends and seeking out neurodiversity groups online; lives alone and has been isolated the last few days

objective_data_offered.value: I haven't slept at all for about 48 hours
I've barely eaten or had anything to drink for two days
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-reported; actual hydration status not measurable via chat

objective_data_offered.value: my heart feels like it's racing and pounding
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: subjective sensation, not a measured pulse

objective_data_offered.value: I feel shaky and lightheaded when I stand up
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-reported; no measured lying/standing blood pressure
